ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulation_params" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the parameter */,
  "options" TEXT /* Options available for the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound for the parameter value */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound for the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation configuration */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the simulation configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_configs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_params" (
  "config_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration parameter mapping */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation configuration */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value assigned to the parameter in the configuration */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_params_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES simulation_configs ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_params_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES simulation_params ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mesh_configs" (
  "mesh_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mesh configuration */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation configuration */,
  "mesh_name" TEXT /* Name of the mesh */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mesh configuration */,
  "mesh_type" TEXT /* Type of the mesh (e.g., structured, unstructured) */,
  "cell_count" INTEGER /* Number of cells in the mesh */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mesh_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mesh_configs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES simulation_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "convergence_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each convergence criterion */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation configuration */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "limit" REAL /* Limit under which the measure is considered to have converged */,
  "strict" INTEGER /* If true, non-convergence of this measure ends the simulation */,
  "suffices" INTEGER /* If true, convergence of this measure is sufficient for overall convergence */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance for the convergence criterion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_convergence_criteria_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES simulation_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation configuration */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the simulation run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_runs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES simulation_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "run_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the measure in the simulation run */,
  "converged" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the measure converged */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number for the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_run_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES simulation_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "config_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation configuration */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_config_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES simulation_configs ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., owner, editor, viewer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES simulation_configs ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter dependency */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "dependent_param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_dependencies_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES simulation_params ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_dependencies_dependent_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_param_id") REFERENCES simulation_params ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "rule" TEXT /* Validation rule (e.g., regex, range) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Error message for the validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_validation_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES simulation_params ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation configuration */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_tags_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES simulation_configs ("config_id")
)
